subcodes.first_line: Glorified be God Who hath manifested His Cause and made all things speak forth that there is none other God but Him, the Truth, the Knower of things unseen [3.5s]... ...Happy is the man who will arise to serve My Cause, and glorify My beauteous Name. Take hold of My Book with the power of My might
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الله اظهر امره و انطق الاشیاء علی انه لا اله الا هو الحق علام الغیوب
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
